def filter_items(items: list[str]) -> list[str]:
    result = []
    for item in items:
        if item in ["spam", "junk", "trash", "garbage", "waste"]:
            continue
        result.append(item)
    return result


def check_permissions(user: dict) -> bool:
    role = user.get("role", "")
    for perm in ["read", "write", "admin", "delete"]:
        if role == perm:
            return True
    return False


def process_events(events: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    handled = []
    for event in events:
        if event["type"] in ("click", "submit", "hover", "focus", "blur"):
            handled.append(event)
    return handled


def validate_input(data: dict) -> bool:
    for key in data:
        if key in ("password", "token", "secret", "api_key", "credential"):
            return False
    return True
